What I do

If it runs on a screen,
I can build it.

You describe what you need in plain English. I handle the rest — design, code, testing, and launch.

🖥️
Websites
A site that loads fast, looks sharp on any phone, and turns visitors into customers. No templates — built for your business.
React SEO Performance
📱
Mobile Apps
One codebase, two platforms. Your app runs on iPhone and Android without paying to build twice.
React Native UX Release
📊
Dashboards & Admin Tools
See your data clearly. Manage your business without spreadsheets. Custom-built for exactly how you work.
Data UX Security
⚙️
Automation
Stop doing the same thing manually every day. I build systems that run the repetitive work so you don't have to.
Workflows APIs Integrations
🛒
E-commerce
Online stores that sell. From product listings to payment processing to order tracking — all in one place.
Commerce Payments UX
🔧
Fix & Improve Existing Software
Slow site, broken feature, or code someone else left behind? I audit it, fix what's wrong, and make it faster.
Audit Refactor Stability
How it works

From idea to live — in four steps.

No long contracts. No mystery. You always know where things stand.

1
You talk, I listen
Tell me what you want to build and why. No jargon needed. I ask the right questions.
2
I map it out
You see a clear plan and a fixed price before any code gets written.
3
I build it
You get progress updates throughout. No radio silence, no surprises at the end.
4
You launch
I handle deployment and stay around for 30 days to fix anything that comes up.
Selected work

Things I've built.

Real projects, production systems. Not demos.

Trading infrastructure
SMC SuperFIB
A high-availability execution engine for algorithmic trading and risk monitoring with low latency and built-in auditability.
React Node.js AWS
View case study
Community finance
Stokvel Society
A membership platform for cooperative savings, with secure onboarding, contribution tracking, and reporting tools.
Astro Tailwind Stripe
View case study
Why work with me

You don't need to understand code
to work with me.

Most developers build what they want to build. I build what you need.

✓
Clear direction
Every project starts with a simple plan and measurable milestones.
✓
Fast delivery
I ship usable work quickly and keep the scope tight around what matters.
✓
Reliable support
I stay on hand after launch to fix things and keep the system stable.
✓
No nonsense
You get honest estimates and a practical approach, not inflated promises.
